quotes.quote_text: “ What could have become of Mr. Bingley and Jane ? ”

context.quote_text: “ was to show you , by every civility in my power , that I was not so mean as to resent the past ; and I hoped to obtain your forgiveness , to lessen your ill opinion , by letting you see that your reproofs had been attended to . How soon any other wishes introduced themselves , I can hardly tell , but I believe in about half an hour after I had seen you . ”
“ I must ask whether you were surprised ? ”
“ Not at all . When I went away , I felt that it would soon happen . ”
